mallorca.title: Mallorca
mallorca.tagline: The Awakening of Your Inner Wave
mallorca.description: OLA VIVA is more than a retreat; it is an invitation for life to flourish through every wave. In this adventure on the most luminous island of the Balearics, we immerse ourselves in a holistic experience designed to awaken your senses and consciousness. Over five days, we will practise Pilates by the sea, sail a yacht through turquoise waters and awaken your creative side with an artisan jewellery workshop. You are not coming to do tourism; you are coming to live a personal and social transformation in a safe and respectful environment.

day1.title: Arrival & Roots
day1.body: Transfer to our exclusive villa, the refuge where our new version will flourish. Welcome circle and group dynamics to break the ice and create genuine bonds. Gentle stretching session at sunset and nutritious dinner to begin the journey with renewed energy.

day2.title: Flowing in the Blue
day2.body: Morning Pilates session in the villa garden to activate the body. Off to virgin coves for a Snorkelling experience, exploring life beneath the Mediterranean mirror. Jewellery-making workshop in the afternoon, using elements from the surroundings to materialise your connection with the island.

day3.title: Sailing & Silence
day3.body: Full day aboard a sailboat. We will feel the freedom of the breeze and the movement of the waves. Guided meditation at sea, seeking mental calm and inner silence. Return to the villa for an afternoon of rest and shared time.

day4.title: Creativity & Summit
day4.body: Morning hike through the Sierra de Tramuntana, combining physical activity with spectacular views. Painting or body-painting workshop inspired by the olive-green and pale-rose colours of our essence. Epic farewell dinner in a natural setting, toasting the transformation lived.

day5.title: Rebirth & Return
day5.body: Final meditation session and nutritious community breakfast. Retreat closing: we leave with more than photos — with a support network and a renewed soul. Transfer to the airport and return home.

highlights.h1: Pilates and Meditation sessions by the sea
highlights.h2: Private yacht sailing to exclusive coves
highlights.h4: Jewellery workshop and creative activities for the soul
highlights.h5: Full villa exclusively for the OLA VIVA group
highlights.h6: Cultural immersion and connection with local traditions

included.i2: Private transport for all island transfers
included.i3: OLA VIVA monitors and guides throughout the experience
included.i4: Travel insurance and photo/video report of the retreat

travelStyle.t3: Full villa exclusively for the group
travelStyle.t4: Monitors caring for the group atmosphere at all times

q1.question: Can I go alone?
q1.answer: Of course! Most people who join our experiences come without a companion. OLA VIVA is the perfect space to meet new people and create genuine bonds in a respectful environment.

q2.question: What ages are usually in the group?
q2.answer: Our retreats are open to anyone who wants to connect with themselves and with nature. We usually have a diverse group where energy and willingness to share are what matter most.

q3.question: Is the trip very physically demanding?
q3.answer: You don't need to be an athlete. Our Pilates sessions and hiking routes are designed to activate the body and find balance, not for competition. We adapt to the group's pace at all times.

q4.question: Is the flight included in the price?
q4.answer: No, the retreat price does not include round-trip flights so each person has flexibility. However, we will advise you on finding the most economical and comfortable option to reach the island.

q5.question: Where will we sleep during the retreat?
q5.answer: We will stay in an exclusive villa for our group of 20 people. It is a private property designed to foster calm, well-being and coexistence, serving as our base of operations and healing.

q6.question: How are meals managed?
q6.answer: Meals and dinners are not included so each attendee can manage their budget and dietary preferences freely. However, we will organise group dinners and nutritious breakfast sessions to foster social connection.

q7.question: Is the trip safe?
q7.answer: Absolutely. We have insurance included in the booking and team monitors who look after the group atmosphere and logistics at all times.

q8.question: How do I book my spot?
q8.answer: Very simple: just make an initial payment of €180 to secure your place in the villa. The remaining amount is paid later, before the start of the trip.

tenerife.title: Tenerife
tenerife.description: OLA VIVA invites you on an expedition to your centre on the island of eternal spring. Tenerife is not just a destination — it is a vehicle for personal and social transformation. In this retreat, the force of the volcano and the vastness of the ocean come together to help you flourish into your best version. Over 5 days, we will connect with the purity of intention through movement and respect for the environment. We will practise Barre by the sea, meditate under the star-filled sky of the Teide and sail in search of the freedom that only the Atlantic can offer.

day1.title: Welcome to the Canarian Eden
day1.body: Arrival and transfer to our exclusive villa, a nature-surrounded refuge to disconnect from routine. Opening circle and group dynamics to create a safe and family atmosphere from the very first minute. Guided meditation at sunset to set the intention of the retreat.

day2.title: Flowing with the Ocean
day2.body: Barre session on the beach at dawn, activating the body with the sea breeze. Kayak excursion for dolphin watching, a deep connection with local wildlife in its natural habitat. Paddle surf afternoon and free time to enjoy the black volcanic sand beaches.

day3.title: The Breath of Teide
day3.body: Early morning departure to experience the sunrise at Teide, above the clouds, where the sky blazes in orange tones. Yoga session in a volcanic setting to integrate the energy of the island. Rest afternoon at the villa and creative workshop to awaken your artistic side.

day4.title: Roots & Magical Forests
day4.body: Hiking through the Anaga forests (laurel forest), a fairy-tale setting covered in mist that seems to belong to another planet. Mindful picnic lunch in the heart of nature. Farewell dinner at the villa, celebrating the genuine bonds created in the group.

day5.title: Rebirth & Expansion
day5.body: Last nutritious breakfast and closing session to share the transformation experienced. Free time for last-minute shopping or sea bathing before the airport transfer.

highlights.h1: Sunrise at Teide above the clouds
highlights.h3: Barre and Yoga facing the Atlantic

included.i1: Accommodation in exclusive villa for the group only
included.i2: Private transport for all activities and transfers
included.i3: Guided activities: Kayak, Teide, Hiking, Yoga, Barre and Paddle Surf
included.i4: Basic travel insurance, 24/7 monitors and experience photos/videos

travelStyle.t1: Groups of up to 15 people (family style)
travelStyle.t3: Full villa exclusively for the group
travelStyle.t4: Monitors caring for the group atmosphere at all times

q1.question: Can I go alone?
q1.answer: Of course! Most of our travellers come alone. OLA VIVA is a space designed for a group that starts as strangers to end up being part of something special.

q2.question: Is the trip very physically demanding?
q2.answer: No. The Yoga, Barre and Hiking activities are designed to activate the body in a balanced way. We seek holistic health and adapt to the group's pace so the experience is transformative, not exhausting.

q3.question: Do I need prior experience in Paddle Surf or Kayak?
q3.answer: Not at all. These water activities are designed for you to enjoy the surroundings and local wildlife, such as dolphin watching, safely and guided by monitors.

q4.question: What is the accommodation like?
q4.answer: We will sleep in an exclusive villa for our group of 15 people. It is a safe and respectful environment where we foster calm and family coexistence.

q5.question: Is the flight included?
q5.answer: No, round-trip flights are not included to give you freedom of management. However, the OLA VIVA team will help you arrange them as economically as possible.

q6.question: What ages are usually in the retreat?
q6.answer: Our retreats attract people of various ages who share the purpose of disconnecting from routine and seeking a deep connection with themselves and with nature.

q7.question: Is the trip safe?
q7.answer: Absolutely. The retreat includes basic travel insurance and you will be accompanied at all times by monitors who look after the atmosphere and logistics.

q8.question: How do I book my spot?
q8.answer: You can book your place with an initial payment of €149. The remaining amount is paid later, before the start of the trip.

madeira.title: Madeira
madeira.tagline: The Blooming of the Wild Island
madeira.description: OLA VIVA returns to the wildest island in Europe for an adventure of integral transformation. On this expedition, we will not only traverse landscapes that seem to belong to another planet, but use the environment to flourish through art and movement. Over 5 days, we will immerse ourselves in magical forests, meditate in front of enchanting waterfalls and awaken our creativity painting on the beach. This is an invitation for those seeking wild nature, deep connection and a community that becomes something more.

day1.title: Welcome at the Portuguese Quinta
day1.body: Arrival, welcome and transfer to our beautiful Portuguese house, our base of peace on the island. Group dynamics to create the energy that will define the trip and first Meditation session to connect with the land. Group dinner and rest at our exclusive villa.

day2.title: Lava Waters & Sand Canvases
day2.body: Nutritious breakfast included at the villa. Morning Snorkelling in the natural pools of Porto Moniz or the Seixal coast, exploring the ocean. In the afternoon, Painting workshop on the black sand beach, followed by a mindful Picnic facing the Atlantic.

day3.title: The Green Heart of Madeira
day3.body: Morning Yoga session among the wild vegetation. Hiking through Fanal Forest: walking among century-old trees and mist, a fairy-tale setting. Visit to the Lagoa do Vento Waterfall, where we will enjoy a dip in its natural lake.

day4.title: Sunrise in the Clouds & Textile Art
day4.body: Early morning departure to experience the sunrise at Pico do Arieiro, the most famous spot above the clouds. Pilates session with panoramic views of the island's mountains. Creative Tote Bag workshop: personalise your bag with motifs inspired by OLA VIVA's Lily and local nature.

day5.title: Closing & Return
day5.body: Final group Meditation session and breakfast at the house. Visit to local points of interest for last-minute craft shopping. Transfer to the airport to begin the journey home with a renewed soul.

highlights.h3: Hiking in the magical Fanal forest
highlights.h4: Painting workshop on black sand beach
highlights.h5: Dip in the Lagoa do Vento waterfall

q1.question: Do I need to know how to paint or do yoga?
q1.answer: No, our workshops and sessions are for all levels. We seek personal expression and holistic well-being.

q2.question: How do I book my spot?
q2.answer: Pay only €149 to reserve. The rest is paid before travelling in June.

q3.question: What clothes should I bring?
q3.answer: Being June, light clothing for beach workshops, but also something warm for the early morning sunrise at the highest peak.

galicia.title: Galicia
galicia.tagline: The Northern Wave & the Inner Path
galicia.description: OLA VIVA invites you to a necessary pause in the land of the "meigas" and infinite forests. This weekend retreat is a wave of fresh air designed for those seeking to reconnect with their essence amid the sea mist and millennial stone. In just 3 days, we will move from the calm of meditation on virgin beaches to the historical energy of Santiago de Compostela. We will sail to the paradise of the Cíes Islands and let ourselves be cared for in our Galician villa.

day1.title: Roots in the Rías Baixas
day1.body: Arrival and welcome at our exclusive villa near Vigo, a green-surrounded setting where life flourishes. Opening circle and meditation to leave behind the city noise. Sunset walk through the centre of Vigo, enjoying its light and local culture before our first shared dinner.

day2.title: Paradise & The Way
day2.body: Morning Yoga and Meditation session facing the sea to activate body and mind. Boat trip to the Cíes Islands. Mindful walk to the lighthouse and disconnection time at Rodas Beach, one of the most beautiful in the world. In the afternoon, transfer to Santiago de Compostela: spiritual and cultural visit to the historic centre.

day3.title: Calm & Farewell
day3.body: Gentle Yoga session at the villa followed by a nutritious breakfast. Visit to local beaches around Vigo for a final contact with the Atlantic waters. Closing group dynamic and farewell. We leave with stories, connection and new energy for the week.

highlights.h1: Boat trip to the Cíes Islands (Rodas Beach)
highlights.h2: Spiritual visit to Santiago de Compostela
highlights.h3: Yoga and Meditation facing the Atlantic
highlights.h4: Exclusive villa in the Rías Baixas

included.i2: Private transport for transfers to Santiago, Vigo and port
included.i3: Boat ticket to the Cíes Islands
included.i5: OLA VIVA monitors accompanying throughout the experience

travelStyle.t1: Low intensity, designed for enjoyment and mental calm
travelStyle.t3: Exclusive villa for the group only

q1.question: Is the trip very demanding?
q1.answer: No, it is a low-intensity retreat designed for enjoyment and mental calm.

q2.question: How do I book?
q2.answer: Pay only €90 to reserve your spot. The rest is paid before the trip.

q3.question: Can I go alone?
q3.answer: Of course! Most of our travellers come alone looking to create genuine bonds in a safe environment.

q4.question: What about meals?
q4.answer: Like other OLA VIVA destinations, meals are not included so each person can manage their budget freely in the rich Galician gastronomy.

merch.shippingNote: Shipping costs will be calculated at checkout.
merch.checkoutSoonBody: We are preparing our online store with all the care it deserves. Soon you will be able to complete your purchase. Thank you for your patience!

products.tshirtShellDesc: Organic cotton t-shirt with OLA VIVA's Shell design. Soft, comfortable and with the essence of our retreats. Perfect for everyday wear or your yoga sessions.
products.tshirtBeachDesc: T-shirt inspired by our beach retreats. Minimalist design with OLA VIVA's colour palette in high quality cotton.
products.hoodieDesc: Hooded sweatshirt in soft sage green. The perfect cover for meditation mornings or sunsets in nature. Premium recycled fabric.
products.totebagShellDesc: Reusable fabric bag with OLA VIVA's iconic Shell design. Durable, spacious and environmentally friendly. Your perfect retreat companion.
products.totebagGrowingDesc: Fabric bag with the Growing design, symbol of the personal growth that inspires every retreat. 100% organic cotton canvas.
products.landyardDesc: Lanyard with the OLA VIVA logo. A subtle detail to carry the energy of the retreats in your daily life.
products.candleJazminDesc: Aromatic jasmine candle made with natural soy wax. The scent that instantly transports you to our retreats. 40-hour clean burn.
products.candlePinkDesc: Candle with soft floral scent in OLA VIVA's characteristic pale rose. 100% natural soy wax. A calming ritual for your home.

contact.title: Write to us
contact.body: Have questions or want to book your spot? We are here for you.

legal.contactNote: If you have questions about these policies, you can contact us on

s1.b: OLA VIVA is the entity responsible for the processing of your personal data collected through this website. You can contact us through the form available in the Contact section.

b: Identification data: full name and email address.
Contact data: phone number (optional) and message sent through the form.
Browsing data: technical and analytical cookies (see Cookie Policy).
Commercial data: destination of interest selected in the contact form.
Manage and respond to inquiries received through the contact form.
Inform you about our retreats, activities, and news, provided you have given your consent.
Manage the contractual relationship derived from booking a spot in our retreats.
Comply with applicable legal obligations.

s4.b: The processing of your data is based on the consent you grant by sending us a form, on the execution of the booking contract when applicable, and on compliance with legal obligations. You can revoke your consent at any time.

s5.b: Your data will be kept for the time necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected and, once that purpose has ended, for the legally required periods.

s6.b: We do not transfer your data to third parties, except by legal obligation or when strictly necessary to provide the service (for example, accommodation providers or travel insurance linked to the contracted retreat).

b: Access: know what personal data we process about you.
Rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
Erasure: request the deletion of your data when it is no longer necessary.
Objection: object to the processing of your data for marketing purposes.
Portability: receive your data in a structured and commonly used format.
Limitation: request the limitation of processing in certain circumstances.

s8.b: You can exercise your rights by sending us a request through the contact form, clearly indicating the right you wish to exercise and attaching a copy of your identity document.

s9.b: OLA VIVA applies appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against loss, unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

s10.b: We reserve the right to update this policy to adapt it to legislative or operational changes. We will notify you of any relevant changes through this same page.

s1.b: These General Conditions regulate the relationship between OLA VIVA and users who contract or consult its services through this website. By accessing the site or booking a spot in any of our retreats, you accept these conditions in full.

s2.b: OLA VIVA organizes group spiritual retreats in different national and international destinations. The service includes accommodation, guided activities, internal transport, and travel insurance, as detailed in the description of each retreat. Round-trip flights, unspecified meals, and personal expenses are excluded from the price unless otherwise indicated.

b: The booking is formalized by paying the deposit indicated for each retreat.
The remaining amount must be paid prior to the start date of the retreat, according to the instructions provided by OLA VIVA.
Until the deposit is received and confirmed, the spot will not be considered booked.
Published prices are in euros and include applicable VAT.
More than 30 days in advance: 100% refund of the amount paid.
Between 15 and 30 days in advance: 50% refund of the amount paid.
Less than 15 days in advance: no refund will be made.
In all cases, OLA VIVA will study the possibility of applying the amount to a future retreat.

s5.b: In case of cancellation of the retreat due to OLA VIVA, a full refund of all amounts paid will be made. OLA VIVA is not responsible for expenses derived from flights or other services contracted independently by the participant.

s6.b: OLA VIVA reserves the right to modify the itinerary, activities, or accommodation due to force majeure, adverse weather, or any other circumstance beyond its control, always striving to maintain the essence and quality of the retreat.

b: The participant declares to be in adequate physical and mental condition to perform the programmed activities.
The participant agrees to respect the rules of coexistence of the group and the instructions of the OLA VIVA monitors at all times.
OLA VIVA is not responsible for damages or injuries derived from the non-observance of these rules.

s8.b: All contents of this website (texts, images, logos, design) are the property of OLA VIVA or its licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws. Reproduction without express authorization is prohibited.

s9.b: These conditions are governed by Spanish legislation. For any controversy, the parties submit to the courts and tribunals of the consumer's domicile.

s10.b: For any query related to these conditions, you can contact us through the form available on our Contact page.

s1.b: Cookies are small text files that websites save on your device when you visit them. They allow the site to remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.

b: Technical cookies (necessary): essential for the operation of the site. They include the language preference cookie (NEXT_LOCALE). They do not require consent.
Analytical cookies: allow us to analyze the use of the site anonymously and in aggregate to improve our content and services. They are only activated if you give your consent.
Third-party cookies: if we use third-party services such as Google Analytics or social networks, they may install their own cookies. Consult their individual policies for more information.

s3.b: This technical cookie stores your language preference (Spanish or English) so you don't have to select it on every visit. It expires when you close the browser or when you manually change the language.

b: You can configure your browser to reject all cookies or to notify you when one is about to be installed.
Keep in mind that disabling technical cookies may affect the correct functioning of the site.
Instructions for major browsers: Chrome (Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies), Firefox (Preferences > Privacy), Safari (Preferences > Privacy), Edge (Settings > Privacy).
Session cookies: deleted automatically when the browser is closed.
Persistent cookies: remain on your device for the period indicated in each cookie, or until you delete them manually.

s6.b: We may update this policy to reflect changes in the cookies we use or in the applicable regulations. We recommend reviewing it periodically. The date of the last update always appears at the beginning of the document.
